page.title: Jet Ski Puerto Banus | Boat Rental Marbella

data.meta_description: Rent a jet ski in Puerto Banús from €749 for 2 hours. Licensed skipper, fuel, drinks & snacks included. Book your Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski today!
data.summary: Rent a jet ski in Puerto Banús with Boat Rental Marbella. Our Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski accommodates 3 passengers, includes a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks & snacks, and departs from Puerto Banús.
key_facts: Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski: 3.4m long, 3 passengers.
Includes licensed skipper, fuel, drinks & snacks.
Pricing from €749 for 2 hours (Tier A boats).
All charters include insurance and Spanish IVA (21%).
Book via WhatsApp for custom durations.

faq.q: Do I need a licence to rent a jet ski in Puerto Banús?
faq.a: No, you do not need a licence. Our licensed skipper operates the jet ski, so you can relax and enjoy the ride. This is included in every charter.

faq.q: How many people can ride the Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski?
faq.a: The Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski accommodates up to 3 passengers. It is 3.4 metres long and ideal for couples or small groups wanting a fast, fun experience.

faq.q: What is included in the jet ski charter price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden fees.

faq.q: How much does a jet ski rental in Puerto Banús cost?
faq.a: Prices start from €749 for 2 hours (Tier A boats like the Sea-Doo GTX). For longer charters, pricing is on request via WhatsApp. All prices include skipper, fuel, and extras.

faq.q: Where does the jet ski depart from?
faq.a: All our jet skis depart from Puerto Banús, the famous marina in Marbella. You can also arrange pick-up from Marbella Marina or other nearby spots.

faq.q: Can I book a jet ski for a full day?
faq.a: Yes, you can book for longer durations. For example, Tier A boats cost €2,299 for 8 hours. Contact us via WhatsApp for custom times and availability.
We offer flexible cancellation. Please check with our team via WhatsApp for the exact policy. Typically, cancellations made 48 hours in advance are fully refundable.

faq.q: Is fuel included in the jet ski rental?
faq.a: Yes, fuel is included in the price. You don't need to worry about refuelling or extra costs. Just show up and enjoy.

data.body_html:
Jet ski Puerto Banús rentals let you blast across the Mediterranean with the Costa del Sol skyline as your backdrop. Our Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski is a 3.4-metre, 3-passenger machine that departs directly from Puerto Banús. No licence needed — our licensed skipper handles the controls while you hold on. Every charter includes fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and Spanish IVA. Prices start at €749 for 2 hours. Book via WhatsApp for custom durations.

Why rent a jet ski in Puerto Banús?

Puerto Banús is the launchpad for the best jet ski routes on the Costa del Sol. The marina sits right on the Golden Mile, minutes from Marbella's beaches and the Sierra Blanca mountains. From here you can zip past the celebrity yachts, cut across the bay toward Cabopino, or head south to see the coast of Estepona. The water is calm most of the year, with average summer sea temperatures of 24°C. A jet ski gives you freedom to explore coves like Cala del Faro and Cala Cortés that bigger boats can't reach. Plus, you get the thrill of speed — the Sea-Doo GTX can hit 60 km/h in seconds.

Our jet ski: Sea-Doo GTX

We offer one jet ski model: the Sea-Doo GTX. It's 3.4 metres long, seats 3 passengers, and is powered by a Rotax 1630 ACE engine. This machine is stable, comfortable, and easy to ride. Our licensed skipper will take you on a guided tour or let you drive under supervision. The jet ski includes a sound system, waterproof storage, and a reboarding step. It's perfect for couples, small groups, or solo riders who want a high-octane experience. All charters include fuel, so you don't need to worry about refuelling.

Jet ski rental prices in Puerto Banús

Our jet ski is priced under Tier A: €749 for 2 hours, €1,299 for 4 hours, and €2,299 for 8 hours. These prices include the skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA. For longer or custom durations, contact us via WhatsApp. Compared to other rentals, our package is all-inclusive — no hidden extras. You can also combine a jet ski charter with a boat hire from our fleet, like the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39.

What’s included in your jet ski charter

  • Licensed skipper (no licence needed from you)
  • Fuel for the entire trip
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava
  • Light snacks (chips, nuts, fruit)
  • Insurance and safety equipment
  • Spanish IVA (21%) — no surprises

Everything is included from the moment you step aboard. Just bring sunscreen, a towel, and your sense of adventure.

Best jet ski routes from Puerto Banús

Our skippers know the coast inside out. Popular routes include: Puerto Banús to Cabopino (about 15 minutes each way) — pass Marbella's beaches and spot villas on the hillside. Puerto Banús to Estepona (25 minutes) — see the old town and the new marina. Puerto Banús to Sotogrande (40 minutes) — a longer run past the exclusive port. For a shorter trip, stay in the bay and explore Cala del Faro and Cala Cortés. The skipper can adapt the route to your preferences. All routes include time for swimming and photo stops.

How to book your jet ski in Puerto Banús

Booking is simple. Visit our Boat Rental Marbella page, choose the Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski, and contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date and duration. We'll confirm availability and send you a payment link. You can also book a full-day charter (8 hours) for €2,299. For groups larger than 3, consider adding a speedboat or one of our larger yachts. All charters depart from Puerto Banús. We recommend booking at least 48 hours in advance during summer (June–September).

Frequently asked questions

Do I need a licence to rent a jet ski in Puerto Banús?

No, you do not need a licence. Our licensed skipper operates the jet ski, so you can relax and enjoy the ride. This is included in every charter.

How many people can ride the Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski?

The Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski accommodates up to 3 passengers. It is 3.4 metres long and ideal for couples or small groups wanting a fast, fun experience.

What is included in the jet ski charter price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden fees.

How much does a jet ski rental in Puerto Banús cost?

Prices start from €749 for 2 hours (Tier A boats like the Sea-Doo GTX). For longer charters, pricing is on request via WhatsApp. All prices include skipper, fuel, and extras.

Where does the jet ski depart from?

All our jet skis depart from Puerto Banús, the famous marina in Marbella. You can also arrange pick-up from Marbella Marina or other nearby spots.

Can I book a jet ski for a full day?

Yes, you can book for longer durations. For example, Tier A boats cost €2,299 for 8 hours. Contact us via WhatsApp for custom times and availability.

What is the cancellation policy?

We offer flexible cancellation. Please check with our team via WhatsApp for the exact policy. Typically, cancellations made 48 hours in advance are fully refundable.

Is fuel included in the jet ski rental?

Yes, fuel is included in the price. You don't need to worry about refuelling or extra costs. Just show up and enjoy.
